abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.description: May choose to ignore one Critical Effect per Dramatic Time.

abilities.name: Hard to Wound +1
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer -.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores penalties for terrain while taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Paired Swords (Melee) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Action gains + to attack flip.
(1) Slice and Dice (Melee) | All characters within p3 must succeed TN 11 Defense duel or suffer damage flip with one wielded sword. Damage flip receives -.
(2) Flurry | Discard Twist to take three (1) AP attacks with Close Combat weapon vs single target.
system.notes: Retain muscle memory from life. Reanimated corpses of skilled swordsmen are prized by Resurrectionists. Fearless and immune to pain.
